title: Smoky Tunisian Eggplant Tagine
description: A smoky and creamy Tunisian dish featuring mirin and pickle, perfect for a lazy Sunday, this vegetarian-friendly tagine is a delight to the senses. The combination of flavors and textures will transport you to the bustling markets of Tunisia.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the cubed eggplant and cook until it is tender and lightly browned.
Add the smoked paprika, cumin, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the mirin, pickle, and canned diced tomatoes, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook, covered, for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Remove the lid and continue to cook for an additional 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the sauce has thickened and the flavors have melded together.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
